positive: A dramatic, neon-drenched cyberpunk city street scene at night. Flying vehicles, towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements, and rain reflecting electric blue and magenta lights. Cinematic illustration, highly detailed, concept art, Blade Runner aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, sunny, natural grass, cartoon, soft edges
